texto: Yes. She got into a right state when she realized no one could read them, though. She's setting up some sort of literacy curse. Some of the boys want to know--is that like gypsy magic? Can you curse someone to read?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Anne Mallory: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Yes. She got into a right state when she realized no one could read them, though. She's setting u…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, historical-romance, curse pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: You read a lot?" Galina finally asked."Yes. It's an escape into another world." She tried to keep her words light instead of sad, thoughts of her family in her head. "Sometimes that is the best part of a hard day.
